eval-discount-trap.headline: ⚡ Sources disagree: Nykaa absent, Myntra shows subsidized liquidation, Meesho shows price-driven volume. No clean demand signal.

conflicts.title: Nykaa absent vs Myntra strong (discount-driven) vs Meesho strong (price-driven)
conflicts.nykaa_says: No premium demand for this style.
conflicts.myntra_says: High rank but demand is driven by 65% discount (Subsidized Liquidation).
conflicts.meesho_says: High volume at ₹299 with moderate rating (3.6).
conflicts.buyer_question: Is there any genuine style preference, or is all demand purely price-driven?
conflicts.proves: The style has visibility and volume at low price points, but no premium traction.
conflicts.cannot_prove: Cannot prove the style has sustainable demand at higher margins or without deep discounts.

convergences.title: All external sources show some presence
convergences.detail: Nykaa absent, but Myntra and Meesho both have products. However, quality is poor.

convergences.cannot_prove: Cannot prove the traction is healthy or profitable.

eval-discount-trap.upside_summary: Meesho shows strong volume (8000+ units) at ₹299, indicating price-sensitive demand. If you can source at a low cost and sell at a competitive price, there may be volume opportunity.
eval-discount-trap.catch_summary: Myntra's product is a subsidized liquidation with low rating (3.2), suggesting the style may not have genuine appeal. Nykaa absence confirms no premium demand. The demand is entirely price-driven, not style-driven.

eval-mass-only.headline: ⚡ Sources disagree: Meesho shows explosive price-sensitive demand, but Nykaa absent and Myntra discount-dependent — demand integrity is questionable at higher price points.

eval-mass-only.upside_summary: Meesho's 52,000+ units and accelerating reseller growth indicate strong viral potential in tier-2/3/4 markets. If you can source at a cost that allows ₹199 retail with margin, volume could be significant.
eval-mass-only.catch_summary: Nykaa's absence and Myntra's discount dependency suggest this is a price-sensitive commodity, not a style-driven trend. At higher price points, demand may evaporate. Internal POS has no data to validate.

myntra.reason: Moderate presence but discount risk high; review velocity down-weighted 25%.

Low discount levels indicate genuine style preference. Meesho's accelerating reseller growth suggests emerging demand in tier-2/3/4 markets.
